https://i0.wp.com/fossgames.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/tremulous_-_human_base_goons.jpg?resize=880%2C440&amp;ssl=1 880w" data-sizes="(max-width: 880px) 100vw, 880px" title="Tremulous free and open source team-based FPS with RTS elements" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==" style="--smush-placeholder-width: 880px; --smush-placeholder-aspect-ratio: 880/440;"><div class="slide-content clearfix"><h2 class=entry-title><a href="tremulous-a-free-and-open-source-team-based-first-person-shooter-with-real-time-strategy-elements/" rel=bookmark>Tremulous free and open source team-based FPS with RTS elements</a></h2><div class=entry-meta> <span class=meta-date><a href="tremulous-a-free-and-open-source-team-based-first-person-shooter-with-real-time-strategy-elements/" title="11:57 AM" rel=bookmark><time class="entry-date published updated" datetime="2026-02-20T11:57:44+00:00">20/02/2026</time></a></span></div><div class="entry-content clearfix"><p>Tremulous is a free and open source team-based first-person shooter (FPS) with real-time strategy (RTS) elements Released: 11 August 2005 Version: 1.2 Beta (3 December 2009) License: GNU GPL, CC-BY-SA Developer [&hellip;]</p> <a href="tremulous-a-free-and-open-source-team-based-first-person-shooter-with-real-time-strategy-elements/" class=more-link>Read more</a></div></div></li></ul></div><div class=post-slider-controls></div></div></div><section id=primary class=content-area><main id=main class=site-main role=main><div id=magazine-homepage-widgets class="widget-area clearfix"> <div id=block-3 class="widget widget_block"><h2>Foss Games, Free Open Source Games on Foss Games for the Best Free Games</h2><h3>Freeware Games PC games, gamer, gaming</h3><p>Discover a treasure trove of captivating free FOSS games, free games, freeware games and some of the best open source games for all platforms from PC games to Android Games.</p><p>Immerse yourself in thrilling adventures, puzzles, and simulations while enjoying the freedom of open source gaming.</p><p>Enhance your gaming experience with high-quality free PC games and unlock endless entertainment.</p><p>Whether you're a casual video gamer or a seasoned game player, we have something for everyone.</p><p>Play, create, and embrace the world of FOSS games, freeware games, opensource games and free games today.</p><p>FOSS games, often referred to as <a href="faq-frequently-asked-questions/" target=_blank rel=noopener>open source games</a> or open source video games, have gained significant popularity in recent years.</p><p>These games are developed with a collaborative and transparent approach, allowing enthusiasts and developers to contribute to their creation and improvement.</p><figure id=attachment_20551 aria-describedby=caption-attachment-20551 style="width: 475px" class="wp-caption aligncenter"><a href="wp-content/uploads/2015/11/cropped-cropped-fossgames-4.png"><picture><source data-srcset="https://fossgames.com/wp-content/webp-express/webp-images/uploads/2015/11/cropped-fossgames-4.png.webp" type="image/webp"><img decoding=async class="size-full wp-image-20551 webpexpress-processed lazyload" title="Free best open source games" data-src="wp-content/uploads/2015/11/cropped-fossgames-4.png" alt="best free open source games" width=475 height=247 src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==" style="--smush-placeholder-width: 475px; --smush-placeholder-aspect-ratio: 475/247;"></picture></a><figcaption id=caption-attachment-20551 class=wp-caption-text>fossgames</figcaption></figure><p>Open source games not only offer engaging gameplay experiences but also foster a sense of community among players and developers alike.</p><p>By embracing the principles of open source development, these games encourage innovation, accessibility, and freedom, making them a vibrant and exciting corner of the gaming world.</p><p>Whether you're a gamer looking for diverse and customizable experiences or a developer seeking to contribute to a creative community.</p><p>Open source games offer a unique and rewarding platform for exploration and collaboration plus they are free games.</p> #opensource #freegames #gaming #pcgames #gamer</div></div></main></section> <section custom-html-widget"><h2>About Us & Open Source Games</h2> <br><p> An open source video game, or simply an open source game, is a video game whose source code is open source. They are often freely distributable and sometimes cross-platform compatible.</p><p>We are a FREE resource for open source games and cannot keep up to date with all posts, things may change that we do not know about.
If you think a page needs an update please let us know so we can look and see what we can do. <br></p><h2>Why FOSS Games or Free Open Source Games?</h2><p><br> Well maybe you are a parent who is fed up with your kids wanting the latest PC Game, or has a console (XBox Sony Playstations etc) and games are expensive.<br><br>With open source games, they are generally free or a slighltly older version is if the latest isn't.<br>They can be available for Windows, Linux (of various versions) or Mac OsX plus some others. Some even have versions for all these three. <br>The games are often open sourced versions of original games that have been abandoned by the original company,<br>sometimes they are written from scratch, or re-written by enthusistic programmers who do it for fun, pleasure or learning<br>being open source games means they can end up with branches or versions all slighltly different with diffrent scenarios or aims<br>mods are often available to achieve different things<br>It also means people can view the code and point out security flaws, bugs and improvements to make things even better<br>So we hope you enjoy our website and playing some of the games.</p><ul><li> best foss games</li><li> open source rpg game</li><li> open source games</li><li> open source space game</li><li> open source game clones</li><li> open source game projects</li><li> best open source games</li><li> open source games linux</li></ul> #gamer #gamers #gamerz #onlinegames #fossgames #foss #open source #open source #linux #windows #mac #osx #freegames #PC #PCGames #freeware #gamedev #gamedeveloper #indiedev <br></div></aside><aside id=custom_html-8 class="widget_text widget widget_custom_html clearfix"><div class=widget-header><h3 class=widget-title>Donate to Us</h3></div><div class="textwidget custom-html-widget"><br>Just in case you feel inclined and you want to donate a little Bitcoin(BTC) or Satoshi, any amount would be appreciated.<br> <strong>Donate to Bitcoin account: 1MNiKYHExU3rcjBcCam4PZ3qMSxyf9uyaK</strong></div></aside></section> </div><footer id=colophon
